Closes #

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix (patch)
- [ ] New feature (minor)
- [ ] Breaking change (major)
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cargo build --release` is clean
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` *Unreleased* entry if users would notice this
- [ ] Security-sensitive code (crypto / format / `safe_join` / lockout) has tests
- [ ] No AI co-author trailer in commits
